home.intro1: When you think of apartment rental in Bodrum, we want to be the name that comes first. From the vibrant beachfront of Gümbet to the boutique marina of Yalıkavak, from the family-friendly shores of Turgutreis to the quiet coves of Bitez — we offer carefully selected apartments in every corner of the peninsula. Every apartment is inspected in person, every photo is real, every price is transparent.
home.intro2: Why an apartment instead of a hotel? Because a holiday is more than just a place to sleep — it's freedom. Breakfast in your own kitchen, sunset from your own balcony, Bodrum at your own pace. Without the constraints of a hotel room, with family or friends, at a much better price. We offer daily, weekly and monthly rental options that fit every budget and every plan.
home.intro3: Wherever you arrive in Bodrum, we're with you. Need a VIP transfer from Milas-Bodrum Airport? Done. Looking for a boat for a blue tour stretching to Marmaris? Our fleet is ready. Want to explore Bodrum on your own with a rental car? We'll find you the best deal. Plan every piece of your trip on a single platform — leave the rest to us.
home.intro4: How does booking work? Enter your dates and number of guests, browse available apartments, pick one and submit the form. Within one hour we'll reach you on WhatsApp or by phone, confirm availability and share payment details. Your booking is complete within minutes. Free cancellation stays valid until 7 days before your arrival.
home.intro5: Local team, local knowledge. We live in Bodrum and we breathe Bodrum. Which beach suits families with children, which restaurant gets the freshest fish, which bay lets you escape the crowds — ask us, we'll guide you. Make your holiday an experience, not just an accommodation.
home.intro6: Start your search now to come to Bodrum at the right time, in the right place, at the right price.

faq.q1: Is renting an apartment in Bodrum cheaper than a hotel?
faq.a1: Usually yes, especially for groups of 4 or more. Per-person cost in a shared apartment is often half of a hotel room. Plus, having your own kitchen saves significantly on dining costs.
faq.a2: After you submit the form, we contact you within an hour via WhatsApp or phone. Once availability is confirmed, we share bank transfer details. Your booking is confirmed as soon as we receive payment, and you'll get a confirmation email.
faq.a3: Cancel 7 or more days before arrival for a full refund. Cancellations within 7 days are subject to a partial fee.
faq.a4: We have apartments in Gümbet, Turgutreis, Yalıkavak, Bitez, Ortakent, Gündoğan and Torba. Each district has its own page with available listings.
faq.a5: Yes. We provide VIP transfer from Milas-Bodrum Airport to your apartment. You can request it during booking or reserve directly from our transfer page.
faq.a6: 3 nights minimum in high season (June–September), 2 nights in other months. Some apartments offer weekly discounts.
